title: PNG Optimizer
description: The best optimized modpack for pvp and daily use.
body:
⚡ PNG Optimizer Modpack ⚔️

Take your Minecraft experience to the next level with a modpack designed for maximum performance and competitive PvP gameplay. This pack combines powerful optimization mods, Quality of Life (QoL) improvements, and carefully selected PvP enhancements to give you smooth gameplay and a competitive edge.

🚀 Performance Focused

Built to run smoothly even on mid-range systems.
For example, a laptop with an Intel i5-10210U and 8GB of RAM can run this modpack at up to 200 FPS — or even higher (150 fps or even higher at 1.21.11), depending on settings and texture pack choice.

🎯 PvP Ready

Includes PvP-focused tweaks and improvements to enhance:

Hit registration feel

Visual clarity

Input responsiveness

Overall combat smoothness

Perfect for competitive players who want consistent, high FPS during intense fights.

🛠️ Quality of Life Improvements

Enjoy a cleaner, more efficient Minecraft experience with useful QoL features such as:

Better GUI improvements

Inventory enhancements

Performance-friendly visual upgrades

Customization options

🎨 Texture Pack Support Included

The modpack is fully compatible with optimized texture packs, allowing you to:

Improve visual clarity for PvP

Maintain high FPS

Customize your look without sacrificing performance

Whether you're grinding ranked matches or practicing your aim, this modpack ensures high FPS, low input lag, and a smooth competitive experience — all while keeping your system cool and stable.

Optimize your game. Dominate your fights. ⚔️🔥
